digest.greeting: Jean, Monday’s clearest movement was around portfolio ownership and the CoE newsletter path. The dashboard shows two reminder threads closed today, while the remaining carry-forward work is mostly portfolio follow-through, Incident Response, and tomorrow’s meeting prep.

items.label: Confirmed the legal portfolio ownership follow-up
items.detail: The dashboard marks the Chelsea legal-portfolio reminder complete, and Outlook shows Jean sent the Legal Initial Project Portfolio Review invite to Chelsea today.

items.label: Closed the Marketing portfolio scheduling reminder
items.detail: The dashboard marks the Marketing portfolio meeting reminder complete, keeping that portfolio-owner scheduling thread moving.

items.label: Finish scheduling the remaining portfolio-owner meetings
items.detail: Legal and Marketing moved today, but keep the broader portfolio-owner scheduling push visible until the remaining owner conversations are fully on the calendar.

items.label: Confirm the executive project deck update path
items.detail: Keep the deck path clean for Amazon Connect, SMS Automation, and intake/process changes so leadership visibility is ready this week.

items.label: Push Incident Response stakeholders to finish the incident guides
items.detail: This reminder remains open from Friday. Follow up with the stakeholders and get the incident guides to a clear finish line.

items.label: Keep building the PM team index in Loop
items.detail: Continue the PM team index work in Loop, using a focused block between meetings rather than leaving it as background work.

items.label: Close out any CoE newsletter follow-up
items.detail: Mar sent the first Weekly CoE Newsletter this afternoon with Jean copied. Capture any content cleanups, questions, or next-Monday follow-ups so the newsletter process does not stay open-ended.

items.label: Carry forward BD Portfolio Review blockers and intake choices
items.detail: Use today’s BD Portfolio Review thread to pin down any priority alignment, blockers, or new intake choices that still need a named owner.

items.label: Turn the Maria 1:1 roadblocks into owners
items.detail: The 1:1 agenda was portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Carry forward only the items that still need a named owner after the meeting.

items.label: Review the Court Litify development path
items.detail: Jorge scheduled tomorrow’s Litify development for Court discussion with Anu and Jean optional. Decide whether Jean needs to weigh in before the CoE recommendation path starts to settle.

items.label: 1:1 Jhara & Jean
items.detail: Portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps are the listed agenda.

items.label: Litify development for Court
items.detail: Jorge scheduled time with Anu, with Jean optional, to discuss whether Court Litify improvements should move through CoE from an IT standpoint.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected window before the afternoon meeting stack.

items.label: Go live readiness Levelpath consultation
items.detail: Laura scheduled a short consultation on the pre-go-live process and asked whether there is an adoption assessment.

items.label: EPMO TL Weekly Catch Up
items.detail: Weekly touch base with Janet, Eugenia, Jorge, and Jean.

items.label: bi-weekly sync (J & J)
items.detail: This overlaps the EPMO TL Weekly Catch Up, so watch for the handoff or conflict.

items.label: PM Team Touchpoint
items.detail: Use this to align on Asana updates, Planner, and the weekly deck.

items.label: CSC Portfolio initial review
items.detail: Portfolio review with Hassan follows directly after the PM Team Touchpoint.

items.label: 1:1 Nicolas & Jean
items.detail: The invite notes this is scheduled at a different hour or date, with the recurring series starting next week.
